summary: Tested ZET Mindshare features: Dashboard 'ZET Mindshare' title, Settings with Google Drive and Shortcuts buttons, Ring tool (hollow circle), Layers panel with delete (trash) and visibility (eye) icons, Eraser drag mode toggle, Table panel, Header/Footer panel, Watermark panel, Word count display, Export PDF button. All features verified working.
passed_tests: Dashboard: 'ZET Mindshare' title visible in header
Dashboard Settings: Google Drive section with Connect Drive button (or Connected status)
Editor: Ring tool creates hollow circle (içi boş daire) on canvas
Editor: Layers panel shows elements with delete (trash icon - red) button
Editor: Layers panel shows visibility toggle (eye icon) for hide/show elements
Editor: Layers panel shows lock icon for locking elements
Editor: Layers panel shows reorder controls (up/down arrows)
Editor: Eraser panel has 'Drag Mode (Sürükle)' toggle checkbox
Editor: Table panel with Rows/Columns sliders and Create Table button
Editor: Header/Footer panel with Header/Footer text inputs and Apply button
Editor: Watermark panel with text input, Opacity slider, Apply Watermark button
Editor: Word count shows 'X words' format (e.g., '1 pages · 3 words')
Editor: Export PDF button visible above pages panel in RightPanel
critical_code_review_comments: Ring tool correctly creates shapeType: 'ring' with border-only style (border: 4px solid, backgroundColor: transparent)
Layers panel correctly implements visibility toggle with .filter(el => !el.hidden) in CanvasArea rendering
Eraser drag mode toggle uses eraserDragMode state and 'Çizerek sil' Turkish text for drag mode
Watermark stored in document.watermark object with text and opacity properties
Header/Footer stored in document.header and document.footer properties
Word count implemented via getWordCount() function splitting text on whitespace
Google Drive integration is MOCKED - stores mock token but no real Google API integration
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: (1) Dashboard shows 'ZET Mindshare' (not 'ZET Notes'), (2) Settings has Google Drive Connect and Shortcuts buttons, (3) Ring tool creates hollow circles, (4) Layers panel has trash icon for delete and eye icon for visibility toggle, (5) Eraser has drag mode checkbox with Turkish text 'Sürükle', (6) Table panel creates tables, (7) Header/Footer panel with text inputs, (8) Watermark panel with opacity control, (9) Word count shows 'X words', (10) Export PDF button above pages. MOCKED: Google Drive (mock token only).
mocked_apis: Google Drive integration (mock token, no real Google API)

features_tested_summary.settings_google_drive: Google Drive section with Connect Drive button - VERIFIED
features_tested_summary.settings_shortcuts: Shortcuts button in Settings panel - VERIFIED
features_tested_summary.ring_tool: Creates hollow circle (border only, no fill) - VERIFIED
features_tested_summary.layers_delete_button: Red trash icon for each layer element - VERIFIED
features_tested_summary.layers_visibility_toggle: Eye icon to hide/show elements (el.hidden filter) - VERIFIED
features_tested_summary.table_panel: Rows/Columns sliders, preview grid, Create Table button - VERIFIED
features_tested_summary.header_footer_panel: Header & Footer panel with text inputs and Apply button - VERIFIED
features_tested_summary.watermark_panel: Text input, Opacity slider (20%), Apply Watermark button - VERIFIED
features_tested_summary.word_count_display: Shows 'X pages · Y words' format - VERIFIED
features_tested_summary.export_pdf_button: Export PDF button at top of RightPanel - VERIFIED
